children.text: a real estate investment trust shall not change to any accounting period other than the calendar year, and
a corporation, trust, or association may not elect to be a real estate investment trust for any taxable year beginning after , unless its accounting period is the calendar year.October 4, 1976

children.heading: Change of accounting period without approval
children.label: b Change of accounting period without approval
children.text: Notwithstanding section 442, an entity which has not engaged in any active trade or business may change its accounting period to a calendar year without the approval of the Secretary if such change is in connection with an election under section 856(c).
